avoid_patterns: Consuming branch-local annotated VCFs before the annotation producer has run or when one branch has no annotated producer at all.
repair_hints: Late normalization or shared-export steps must consume already-produced annotated branch-local VCFs, not fabricated annotated filenames.
If one branch lacks an annotated producer, keep that as an explicit replan gap instead of mirroring a sibling annotation step.
bacterial_evolution_variant_calling.summary: Shared evolution plans must keep ancestor, branch-local annotation, and final export handoffs exact through subtraction, annotation, normalization, and export.

avoid_patterns: Fabricating transcript quantification or annotation files from BAM-only evidence.
Routing annotation-free long-read RNA requests into short-read quantification workflows to satisfy an unsupported contract.
repair_hints: If annotation is explicitly unavailable, drop annotation and quantification requirements and keep sorted/indexed alignment as the supported terminal output.
Use minimap2-backed alignment artifacts plus a clear downstream handoff note when isoform quantification cannot be grounded from provided inputs.
long_read_rna.summary: Annotation-limited long-read RNA requests should degrade to alignment-first outputs, not fabricated quantification.

avoid_patterns: Inventing mock or placeholder pathway names.
Guessing case or control group membership from column order.
Bypassing the repo helper for final pathway comparison when it is already the chosen local route.
repair_hints: Keep the repair centered on the local compare_pathways helper and its validated handoffs.
Preserve explicit sample-group evidence rather than inferring groups from filenames or index position.
multi_model_dge_pathway.summary: Alzheimer pathway repairs should stay helper-backed and avoid fabricated biology.

avoid_patterns: Filtering on impact or ANN-derived fields before the annotation step has produced them.
repair_hints: Preserve the annotation step and only apply impact/effect filtering after annotated VCF output exists.
variant_annotation.summary: Variant-annotation repairs must keep annotation before impact filtering.

avoid_patterns: Joining multiple scientific operations with pipes, &&, ;, or || inside one bash_run step.
Leaving unresolved template placeholders such as <reference_fasta> in command arguments.
repair_hints: Each bash_run step must perform exactly one shell operation. Split multi-operation shell into multiple steps.
Resolve template placeholders such as <reference_fasta> to concrete paths before emitting command arguments.
Prefer typed wrappers over bash_run when a dedicated wrapper exists for the operation.
bash_run.summary: Keep bash_run atomic, resolve placeholders explicitly, and prefer typed wrappers over compound shell.

avoid_patterns: Retrying GATK-style QD, MQRankSum, FS, SOR, or ReadPosRankSum filters unchanged against FreeBayes VCFs that do not declare those tags.
Inventing filter tags that are absent from the VCF header.
repair_hints: If a FreeBayes-produced VCF lacks GATK-specific INFO/QD, use QUAL / INFO/DP as the QualByDepth equivalent when INFO/DP is declared.
Validate every filter clause against the input VCF header before retrying; drop or rewrite only clauses backed by declared INFO/FORMAT tags.
bcftools_filter_run.summary: bcftools filter repairs should keep filter expressions consistent with the input VCF producer's declared header tags.

avoid_patterns: Pointing featurecounts_run.input_bams at selected-dir BAM aliases that no earlier step emits.
repair_hints: Keep featurecounts_run.input_bams limited to BAMs that earlier alignment or merge steps actually produce.
If multiple replicate BAMs are listed, preserve one upstream producer for each listed identity before counting.
featurecounts_run.summary: featureCounts repairs must keep BAM inputs producer-complete.

avoid_patterns: Passing undeclared wrapper arguments or dropping Flye-specific parameters during repair.
Falling back from long-read assembly into unrelated RNA or generic shell workflows when assembly remains the requested objective.
repair_hints: For metagenome-style prompts, set an appropriate Flye read mode, enable meta mode, and prefer conservative thread counts and genome-size defaults.
After Docker or OOM failures, retry within the Flye wrapper constraints before considering any fallback, and never cross assay families when no same-class fallback exists.
flye_assemble.summary: Long-read assembly repairs should preserve Flye-specific read-mode, meta-mode, and conservative resource settings.

avoid_patterns: Using diploid defaults in haploid bacterial variant calling.
repair_hints: Use haploid settings for bacterial evolution and preserve branch-local BAM-to-VCF bindings.
freebayes_call.summary: Bacterial FreeBayes repairs should preserve haploid calling and branch-local outputs.

avoid_patterns: Passing plain Bacterial/prokaryotic codon-table overrides into custom SnpEff database builds when the active SnpEff runtime rejects them.
repair_hints: For custom bacterial or ancestor SnpEff database builds, normalize problematic codon_table overrides like 11, Bacterial, or Bacterial_and_Plant_Plastid to the empty string so the packaged default codon handling is used.
snpeff_annotate.summary: snpEff repairs should validate non-empty outputs, preserve local custom database inputs, and avoid incompatible codon-table overrides.
